summary.session_def: speaker; order (chapter,utt); gen-seeds pooled (disjoint utt slices)

diagnostics.shuffle_def: speaker rotation derangement, size-matched snapshots, no self-update

structural_null_diagnostic.reading: the all-zero grid is STRUCTURAL: the dev pool (random 48-utt draws, sessions 2-9 deep) offers <=3 positions where any memory term could act; the confirmatory slice (12 speakers x 12 consecutive reading-order utts) is the designed surface

reproduce: SPEECHRL_DATA_DIR=<repo>/speechrl-data python scripts/m5_selector_rescore_dev.py (CPU-only; re-scores the committed C1 pools; deterministic)
